name: Micro Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Micro Shogi (4x5 shogi): a five-piece drop game with NO promotion zone -- a piece flips to its other face the moment it captures (Silver<->Lance, Gold<->Rook, Bishop<->Tokin, Pawn<->Knight), and flips back when it captures again. Drops may show either face with no restrictions.
